name: IGET Bar Plus S3
description: The IGET Bar Plus S3 Kit features a rechargeable battery with replaceable pods, delivering 10,000 puffs of premium flavour in a compact device.

flavours.name: Double Apple
flavours.description: The IGET Bar Plus S3 Double Apple is a crisp and juicy blend of sweet red and tart green apples for a classic, refreshing taste.

flavours.name: Peach Lychee Lime Ice
flavours.description: The IGET Bar Plus S3 Peach Lychee Lime Ice is a luscious mix of juicy peaches and exotic lychee, perfectly balanced with zesty lime and a refreshing icy finish.

flavours.name: Strawberry Raspberry
flavours.description: The IGET Bar Plus S3 Strawberry Raspberry is a perfect blend of sweet, ripe strawberries and tangy raspberries, delivering a mouthwatering, berry-filled vape experience.

flavours.name: Blackberry Pineapple Orange
flavours.description: The IGET Bar Plus S3 Blackberry Pineapple Orange is a bold fusion of ripe blackberries, tangy pineapple, and zesty orange for a tropical, juicy burst of flavour.

flavours.name: Lemonade Monster
flavours.description: The IGET Bar Plus S3 Lemonade Monster is a zesty fusion of tangy lemonade and the bold, electrifying kick of energy drink for a refreshing and invigorating vape.

flavours.name: Mango Monster
flavours.description: The IGET Bar Plus S3 Mango Monster is a tropical rush of juicy mango fused with the bold, fizzy kick of energy drink for an intense and refreshing vape.

flavours.name: Passion Fruit Blueberry Raspberry
flavours.description: The IGET Bar Plus S3 Passion Fruit Blueberry Raspberry offers a vibrant blend of tangy passion fruit, sweet blueberries, and juicy raspberries for a bold and refreshing fruity explosion.

flavours.name: Strawberry Watermelon Ice
flavours.description: The IGET Bar Plus S3 Strawberry Watermelon ice features a refreshing mix of sweet strawberries and juicy watermelon, complemented by a cool, icy finish for a perfectly chilled, fruity vape.

flavours.name: Strawberry Kiwi Ice
flavours.description: The IGET Bar Plus S3 Strawberry Kiwi Ice - a refreshing combination of ripe strawberries and tangy kiwi, finished with a cool, icy blast for an exhilarating, fruity vape experience.

flavours.name: Cherry Pomegranate
flavours.description: The IGET Bar Plus S3 Cherry Pomegranate offers a rich blend of sweet cherries and tart pomegranate for a bold, fruity punch.

flavours.name: Blackberry Ice
flavours.description: The IGET Bar Plus S3 Blackberry Ice captures the sweet and juicy flavour of ripe blackberries with no trace of bitterness, and an icy menthol finish.

flavours.name: Grape Ice
flavours.description: The IGET Bar Plus S3 Grape Ice is a luscious burst of sweet and juicy grapes, perfectly balanced with a crisp, icy chill for an irresistibly refreshing vape.

flavours.name: Raspberry Grape Mango
flavours.description: The IGET Bar Plus S3 Raspberry Grape Mango offers a delicious medley of sweet raspberries, juicy grapes, and tropical mangoes for a vibrant, fruity explosion in every puff.

flavours.name: Black Forest
flavours.description: The IGET Bar Plus S3 Black Forest offers a symphony of berry goodness, seamlessly combining the succulent sweetness of ripe raspberries, blackberries, and an assortment of other berries, creating a vibrant and complex profile that delivers a fruity explosion with every satisfying puff.

flavours.name: Blackberry Pomegranate Cherry
flavours.description: The IGET Bar Plus S3 Blackberry Pomegranate Cherry contains a unique blend of sweet cherry and pomegranates with a delicious blackberry twist.

flavours.name: Peach Ice
flavours.description: The IGET Bar Plus S3 Peach Ice delivers a bold and juicy burst of ripe, syrupy peach flavour, perfectly balanced with a strong, icy-cool finish. This smooth and satisfying blend is ideal for those who enjoy a vibrant, frosted fruit hit.

flavours.name: Cola Ice
flavours.description: The IGET Bar Plus S3 Cola Ice delivers a crisp, sparkling classic cola base finished with a powerful menthol kick for a refreshing, soda-on-ice experience.

flavours.name: Chupa Chups Grape
flavours.description: The IGET Bar Plus S3 Chup@ Chups Grape captures the nostalgic sweetness of classic grape candy, offering a rich, fruity flavour perfectly balanced with a smooth finish. This delightful blend is perfect for those who enjoy a sweet and fruity vaping experience that transports you back to your childhood.

flavours.name: Strawberry Pomegranate
flavours.description: The IGET Bar Plus S3 Strawberry Pomegranate is a unique mix of strawberries and fresh pomegranates for that tropical hit.

flavours.name: Blueberry Mint
flavours.description: The IGET Bar Plus S3 Blueberry Mint fuses the juicy sweetness of ripe blueberries with a cool, invigorating mint finish, creating a bold and refreshingly smooth vape experience you won’t forget

flavours.name: Passion Fruit Kiwi Guava
flavours.description: The IGET Bar Plus S3 Passion Fruit Kiwi Guava is a vibrant tropical medley that balances the tartness of passion fruit and tangy kiwi with a smooth, sweet guava finish.

flavours.name: Banana Ice
flavours.description: The IGET Bar Plus S3 Banana Ice delivers the creamy sweetness of ripe bananas, expertly blended to create a smooth, rich flavour. This satisfying blend is perfect for those who enjoy a comforting and fruity vaping experience with a natural sweetness.

flavours.name: Blueberry Raspberry Bubble Gum
flavours.description: The IGET Bar Plus S3 Blueberry Raspberry Bubble Gum combines the sweet juiciness of blueberries with tangy raspberries and a nostalgic bubble gum twist for a playful and satisfying vape.

flavours.name: Dynamic Mint
flavours.description: The IGET Bar Plus S3 Dynamic Mint combines the crisp, refreshing taste of cool mint with an invigorating icy kick for a clean and energising vape.

flavours.name: Chupa Chups Strawberry
flavours.description: The IGET Bar Plus S3 Chup@ Chups Strawberry captures the nostalgic sweetness of classic strawberry candy, offering a rich, fruity flavour perfectly balanced with a smooth finish. This delightful blend is perfect for those who enjoy a sweet and fruity vaping experience that transports you back to your childhood.

flavours.name: Mango Ice
flavours.description: The IGET Bar Plus S3 Mango Ice combines the juicy sweetness of ripe tropical mangoes with a refreshing icy blast for a smooth and invigorating vape.
